metadata.name: Operate SELinux
metadata.description: View and set the current SELinux mode
objectives: View and set the current SELinux mode

tasks.name: Verify SELinux is in enforcing mode (runtime)
tasks.description: SELinux should be in enforcing mode as the current runtime setting
tasks.failure_message: SELinux is not in enforcing mode

tasks.name: Verify /etc/selinux/config is set to enforcing
tasks.description: The SELinux configuration file should have SELINUX=enforcing for persistence
tasks.success_message: SELinux config file is set to enforcing
tasks.failure_message: SELinux config file is not set to enforcing

tasks.name: Verify SELinux is not disabled in config
tasks.description: The SELinux configuration should not be set to disabled
tasks.success_message: SELinux is not set to disabled
tasks.failure_message: SELinux is incorrectly set to disabled in config
hints: Edit /etc/selinux/config and change SELINUX=disabled to SELINUX=enforcing
